requirements.requirement: Authorized users see ThinkTank in CSAAS navigation.
tests: frontend/components/layout/__tests__/Sidebar.test.tsx::navigates to the ThinkTank route when the entry is clicked
frontend/components/layout/__tests__/Sidebar.test.tsx::keeps ThinkTank accessible as a titled icon in collapsed state

requirements.requirement: Authorized users open an access-controlled ThinkTank placeholder route.
tests: backend/src/modules/advisory/access/advisory-access.controller.spec.ts::returns the authorized ThinkTank access payload and emits opened audit

requirements.requirement: Do not implement full advisory workspace, session sidebar, conversation workspace, document drawer, workflow runtime, or session creation.
tests: repository search verified no advisory workflow/session/output/checkpoint/rating/context tables or workspace features under advisory implementation

requirements.requirement: Successful authorized access emits audit event thinktank.access.opened.
tests: backend/src/modules/advisory/access/advisory-access.service.spec.ts::emits the access opened audit event without advisory content
backend/src/modules/advisory/access/advisory-access.controller.spec.ts::returns the authorized ThinkTank access payload and emits opened audit

requirements.requirement: Authenticated users without ThinkTank access are blocked with a friendly authorization message.
tests: backend/src/modules/advisory/access/advisory-access.controller.spec.ts::blocks denied users with a friendly message and emits denied audit

requirements.requirement: Blocked access attempt emits audit event thinktank.access.denied.
tests: backend/src/modules/advisory/access/advisory-access.service.spec.ts::emits the access denied audit event with reason
backend/src/modules/advisory/access/advisory-access.controller.spec.ts::blocks denied users with a friendly message and emits denied audit
